room.caption: [HPFA] Always watching...

instance.creationCode: sprite_index=sNormalDoor bShowArrow=true exitType=0 newMapX=96 newMapY=592 toRoom=rCCity_NA_S1 colorChange=1

sprite_index=sWarpGateStand bShowArrow=false exitType=0 newMapX=112 newMapY=288 toRoom=rHPF_T y+=32
if global.gameProgress<=4070 or (global.gameProgress>=4120 and global.gameProgress<=4190) {instance_destroy()}

bStandOnly=true talker="Probable Explanation Toad" stringToShow="There's still Virus Injectors down here because... well we must always allow 100% no matter what. That makes sense, right?" boxSize=3
if global.gameProgress<=4190 {instance_destroy()}
